title: TrickyDungeons
description: A mod that adds many structures with traps
body:
Have you ever wanted to add complexity to Minecraft? or just want to explore something new? Then TrickyDungeons is for you - a vanilla mod that adds many different structures with tricky traps and good loot that also does not greatly affect the vanilla nature of the game and is good for those who like to explore and bypass traps!

Update every month!

Version:
1.20.1

Planned to add:
3 More structures




*developed only by me
